items.original_title: AI-driven memory crunch jolts India’s smartphone market
items.title_en: AI-driven memory crunch jolts India’s smartphone market
items.summary_en: India's smartphone slowdown highlights how the AI boom is reshaping consumer electronics, from pricing and demand to corporate strategy.
items.title_zh: AI驱动的内存危机震荡印度智能手机市场
items.summary_zh: 印度智能手机市场因AI驱动的内存危机受到震荡，显著改变消费者电子产品的定价和需求。这一现象表明AI浪潮对行业的深远影响。

items.original_title: Copilot code review: Customization and configurability improvements
items.title_en: Copilot code review: Customization and configurability improvements
items.summary_en: Copilot code review now utilizes a firewall, custom setup steps, and independent runner configurations. It now reads custom instructions from the head branch to allow for easy testing and validation… The post Copilot code review: Customization and configurability improvements appeared first on The GitHub Blog .
items.title_zh: GitHub Copilot应用现已在使用情况API中可用
items.summary_zh: GitHub Copilot应用现已可通过使用情况API访问，企业管理员可以获得详细的使用报告，提升代码审查的效率与管理能力。

items.original_title: GPT-5.6 is deleting user files when given full access, and OpenAI says it shouldn't but did
items.title_en: GPT-5.6 is deleting user files when given full access, and OpenAI says it shouldn't but did
items.summary_en: OpenAI's GPT-5.6 has accidentally wiped users' entire home directories in several cases, mostly in the unprotected "Full Access Mode." The model overwrites a temporary directory variable and carries out destructive actions on its own instead of asking for confirmation. OpenAI has announced extra safeguards and a detai…
items.title_zh: GPT-5.6在全访问模式下误删除用户文件，OpenAI承诺加强安全措施
items.summary_zh: OpenAI的GPT-5.6在全访问模式下误删除用户文件，导致用户数据丢失的问题引发广泛关注，OpenAI承诺加强安全措施以避免类似事件的发生。

items.original_title: Databricks hits $188B valuation, extending its run as AI’s favorite second act
items.title_en: Databricks hits $188B valuation, extending its run as AI’s favorite second act
items.summary_en: Databricks has remade its image into an AI company and has published research on the cost savings of open weight AI models for coding.
items.title_zh: Databricks估值达1880亿美元，AI的受欢迎程度持续提升
items.summary_zh: Databricks的估值攀升至1880亿美元，表明在AI行业中其企业转型成功，并不可忽视其在开发开源AI模型方面的贡献。

items.original_title: Zuckerberg's plan to sell excess AI compute could finds its first big customer in Anthropic
items.title_en: Zuckerberg's plan to sell excess AI compute could finds its first big customer in Anthropic
items.summary_en: Meta is reportedly in talks with Anthropic to rent out compute capacity from its data centers. The article Zuckerberg's plan to sell excess AI compute could finds its first big customer in Anthropic appeared first on The Decoder .
items.title_zh: Meta计划出租多余的AI计算能力与Anthropic合作
items.summary_zh: Meta计划向Anthropic出售多余的AI计算能力，这可能成为其数据中心的第一个大客户，反映出AI计算资源的市场需求日益增长。

items.original_title: How Apple’s big lawsuit could disrupt OpenAI’s IPO plans
items.title_en: How Apple’s big lawsuit could disrupt OpenAI’s IPO plans
items.summary_en: Apple filed a trade secrets lawsuit against OpenAI last Friday, and it’s not messing around. The complaint alleges a pattern of misconduct reaching all the way up to OpenAI’s chief hardware officer and claims more than 400 former Apple employees now work at the company. OpenAI’s response so far has been carefully hedg…
items.title_zh: 苹果对OpenAI提起商业机密诉讼，或影响其IPO计划
items.summary_zh: Apple对OpenAI提起商业机密诉讼，这可能对OpenAI的IPO计划产生重大影响，体现行业竞争日趋激烈。

items.original_title: Patreon stops asking AI bots not to scrape — and starts blocking them
items.title_en: Patreon stops asking AI bots not to scrape — and starts blocking them
items.summary_en: Patreon is strengthening its defenses against AI scraping by working with Cloudflare to block bots that train AI models on creators’ content without permission. The move marks a shift away from relying on websites using robots.txt alone to actively block unauthorized AI training.
items.title_zh: Patreon与Cloudflare合作，强化防止AI抓取措施
items.summary_zh: Patreon通过与Cloudflare合作，加强对AI抓取的防御，表明在线内容保护正变得日益重要。

items.original_title: The Zoom hack that says, ‘Don’t record me’
items.title_en: The Zoom hack that says, ‘Don’t record me’
items.summary_en: If every meeting, watercooler conversation, and date gets transcribed and summarized, who's actually reading any of it?
items.title_zh: Zoom推出隐私功能“不要录制我”，引发广泛讨论
items.summary_zh: Zoom新的隐私功能“不要录制我”引发讨论，反映出在录音和记录技术日益普及的背景下隐私治理的必要性。
